topic: DBInstance Configuration

  entities:

    gr-1756394635-db-1|DBInstance
    gr-1756394635-cluster|DBClusterIdentifier
    db.r7i.2xlarge|DBInstanceClass
    sg-0d3ff7717958bd983|SecurityGroup
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|SecurityGroup

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has DBClusterIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-cluster']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_DB_CLUSTER_IDENTIFIER|gr-1756394635-cluster

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has DBInstanceClass 'db.r7i.2xlarge']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_DB_INSTANCE_CLASS|db.r7i.2xlarge

    entity-attributes:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|DB_INSTANCE_CLASS|db.r7i.2xlarge

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has VpcSecurityGroup with VpcSecurityGroupId 'sg-0d3ff7717958bd983']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_VPC_SECURITY_GROUP|sg-0d3ff7717958bd983

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has VpcSecurityGroup with VpcSecurityGroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_VPC_SECURITY_GROUP|sg-08526dcf557ad13aa

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has VpcSecurityGroup with VpcSecurityGroupId 'sg-0d3ff7717958bd983' with Status 'active']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_VPC_SECURITY_GROUP|sg-0d3ff7717958bd983

    entity-attributes:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_VPC_SECURITY_GROUP_WITH_STATUS|active
    sg-0d3ff7717958bd983|STATUS|active

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has VpcSecurityGroup with VpcSecurityGroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' with Status 'active']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_VPC_SECURITY_GROUP|sg-08526dcf557ad13aa

    entity-attributes:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_VPC_SECURITY_GROUP_WITH_STATUS|active
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|STATUS|active


topic: DBInstance Endpoint

  entities:

    gr-1756394635-db-1|DBInstance
    gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint|Endpoint

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has Endpoint with Address 'gr-1756394635-db-1.cktfjywp6uxn.us-east-1.neptune.amazonaws.com']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_ENDPOINT|gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint

    entity-attributes:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_ENDPOINT_WITH_ADDRESS|gr-1756394635-db-1.cktfjywp6uxn.us-east-1.neptune.amazonaws.com
    gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint|ADDRESS|gr-1756394635-db-1.cktfjywp6uxn.us-east-1.neptune.amazonaws.com

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has Endpoint with Port 8182]

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_ENDPOINT|gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint

    entity-attributes:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_ENDPOINT_WITH_PORT|8182
    gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint|PORT|8182

  proposition: [The DBInstance with DBInstanceIdentifier 'gr-1756394635-db-1' has Endpoint with HostedZoneId 'ZUFXD4SLT2LS7']

    entity-entity relationships:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_ENDPOINT|gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint

    entity-attributes:
    gr-1756394635-db-1|HAS_ENDPOINT_WITH_HOSTED_ZONE_ID|ZUFXD4SLT2LS7
    gr-1756394635-db-1-endpoint|HOSTED_ZONE_ID|ZUFXD4SLT2LS7

    entity-attributes:
    neptunedbsubnetgroup-qwsd5lphpl2v|SUBNET_GROUP_STATUS|Complete

topic: Subnet Availability and Status

  entities:

    subnet-0693ae4ae6bc5b4c0|Subnet

    subnet-0e8da61218fcf7a55|Subnet
    us-east-1c|SubnetAvailabilityZone
    us-east-1b|SubnetAvailabilityZone
    us-east-1a|SubnetAvailabilityZone

  proposition: [The Subnet with SubnetIdentifier 'subnet-0693ae4ae6bc5b4c0' has SubnetAvailabilityZone with Name 'us-east-1c']

    entity-entity relationships:
    subnet-0693ae4ae6bc5b4c0|HAS_SUBNET_AVAILABILITY_ZONE|us-east-1c

    entity-attributes:
    subnet-0693ae4ae6bc5b4c0|HAS_SUBNET_AVAILABILITY_ZONE_WITH_NAME|us-east-1c
    us-east-1c|NAME|us-east-1c

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    subnet-0693ae4ae6bc5b4c0|SUBNET_STATUS|Active

  proposition: [The Subnet with SubnetIdentifier 'subnet-03d920648eca5694f' has SubnetAvailabilityZone with Name 'us-east-1b']

    entity-attributes:

    us-east-1b|NAME|us-east-1b

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    subnet-03d920648eca5694f|SUBNET_STATUS|Active

  proposition: [The Subnet with SubnetIdentifier 'subnet-0e8da61218fcf7a55' has SubnetAvailabilityZone with Name 'us-east-1a']

    entity-attributes:
